query:
SELECT 
  ws.date,
  ws.day_label,
  JSON_EXTRACT(ex.value, '$.name') as ex_name,
  JSON_EXTRACT(ex.value, '$.machinePreset') as machine_preset,
  JSON_EXTRACT(ex.value, '$.presetId') as preset_id,
  JSON_EXTRACT(ex.value, '$.sets') as sets
FROM workout_sessions ws
JOIN JSON_TABLE(ws.exercises, '$[*]' COLUMNS (value JSON PATH '$')) ex
WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(ex.value, '$.name') = 'Cable Pushdown'
ORDER BY ws.date DESC
LIMIT 10;
